titleStmt.title: SII 9.501: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 501. (A.R. No. 412 of 1920.) ON A ROCK BEHIND THE LINGAYAT-MATHA AT URAVAKONDA, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1439, Yuva, Phālguṇa, śu. 10, corresponding to A.D. 1516 February 13, Wednesday (not verifiable), in the reign of Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya. It records the gift of some plots of land made by Amarada Timmarasa, the Kāryakartta of the king, to Kaṭṭige Tippayya, for constructing a tank to the south of the village of Uruvakoṇḍe.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśāli
vāhanaśakavaruṣa 1439 neya yuvasaṁ
vatsarada phālguṇa śu 10 lu śrīmanmahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
kruṣṇarāyamahārāyara kāryyakartuga
ḷāda Āmarada timmarasaru kaṭṭigeya tippayyage koṭṭaśilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdarenī
nu naṁma Urvvakūṁḍege dakṣiṇadikkinalu Ānadaleya dāriyalu keṟeyanu ho
stāgi kaṭṭida saṁmaṁdha Ā keṟeya keḷage sarvvamānyavāgi koṭa gaddeya bījavari kha 2 ge Ā
keṟeya ṭeṁkadeseya kōḍiya paḍuvase dikkinalu koṭṭa yareya bījavari kha . radalu ga
dde bījavariya khaṁḍuga yereya bījavari hattukoḷaga . dasavaṁda keṟeya keḷagaṇa
bittida bījavari kha 1 kke ¥ 2 . Akṣāradalu khaṁḍugakke yikkuḷada yibaḷa Ā keṟeya Oḷage nīru tuṁbida Aṣṭu
holanū nimage mānyavāgi koṭṭau Eṁdu koṭṭa śilāśāsana Iṣṭanū niṁna putrapautrapāraṁpareyāgi Ācaṁdrārkkastāyigaḷāgi sukha
dalu Anubhavisuviri yiṣṭakke Ārobbarū Aḷupidare taṁma tāyi taṁdegaḷanu śrīmadvāraṇāsiyallū koṁda pāpakke hōharu gōbrā(ṁ)hmara vadhisida pāpa
kke hōharu svamātru gurupatnigamanava māḍida mahāpātakakke hōharu . yiṁtoppudakke I śilāśāsanava koṭṭa Āmarada tiṁmarasara voppa tiṁmarasa
ra baraha . I śilāśāsanava barada sēnabōva Urvvakoṁḍeya dēvarasayyana makkaḷu vōbayyanū .
Digital edition of SII 9.501 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
